description: Pink wallet for women with press button fastening A flap at the back with one id card holder, two slip pockets and six card slots, has a press buttoned closure Once opened, the wallet has a coin pocket with a flap and press buttoned closure on the left, nine card holders and a slip pockets on the right Embossed branding and panelling detailing on the front Warranty: 180 daysWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
